<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/network.habitat.permissions.removePermission"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Revoke read permission from a user for a specific lexicon.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["grantees","collection"],"properties":{"grantees":{"type":"array","items":{"oneOf":[{"type":"object","description":"A DID grantee","required":["did"],"properties":{"did":{"type":"string","format":"did"}},"title":"network.habitat.grantee.didGrantee"},{"type":"object","description":"A clique ref grantee in the form habitat://did:plc:web:arushi/habitat.network.clique/clique-record-key","required":["uri"],"properties":{"uri":{"type":"string","format":"uri"}},"title":"network.habitat.grantee.cliqueRef"}]},"maxItems":100},"collection":{"type":"string","description":"The NSID of the lexicon or record to grant read permission for.","format":"nsid"},"rkey":{"type":"string","description":"The Record Key to grant read permissions to, if any.","format":"record-key","maxLength":512}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

>
  
</StatusCodes>
